title: Comment Feature/Widget For Dashboards
excerpt: I’ve had a few requests from my team to allow for a commenting feature on dashboards. Comments would be for when something needs to be changed/updated or providing feedback on a dashboard as a whole instead of a singular…

posts.author: xsarahwong (Sarah Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve had a few requests from my team to allow for a commenting feature on dashboards. Comments would be for when something needs to be changed/updated or providing feedback on a dashboard as a whole instead of a singular item.

While we can use a text widget as a workaround, this doesn’t allow us to see who posted comment when. It would also be nice if comments can be resolved within the widget. The text widget also has a character limit so this would not be ideal for long-term usage.
